entities.name: NEMATODES
entities.description: Plant parasitic microscopic organisms that act as pests to crops and constrain productivity.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for nematode diagnosis and management.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for nematode diagnosis and management.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output which is constrained by nematode pests.

entities.name: YIELD STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of crop yield which is negatively impacted by nematode pests.

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where farmers lack awareness and trained nematologists to manage nematode pests.

entities.name: DIAGNOSIS
entities.description: The process of detecting the presence of harmful nematodes in soils.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of recommendations and strategies to control nematode damage.

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of encouraging and promoting research and knowledge on nematode control.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Geographic regions where nematode research is being promoted.

entities.name: AFRICAN REGION
entities.description: A geographic area envisaged for participation in future nematode training courses.
